title: orchis coriophora subsp. cimicina
intro: Orchis coriophora subsp. cimicina, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various conditions such as respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
